data.title: Future Mineral Closes First Tranche of Private Placement
data.description: Toronto-based Future Mineral Resources Inc. (TSX: FMR) has successfully closed the First Tranche of its non-brokered private placement financing. The company announced a plan to issue up to 15 million common shares at $0.30 per share, aiming for total gross proceeds of $4.5 million. The Offering was detailed in press releases dated January 7, 2026, and February 2, 2026, accessible on the Company’s SEDAR+ profile at www.sedarplus.ca.

data.title: Couchdrop Partners with HANDD Business Solutions to Enable Modern Enterprises to Simplify Secure File Transfers
data.description: In Christchurch, New Zealand, Couchdrop, a cloud-native platform facilitating secure file transfers, has revealed a strategic collaboration with HANDD Business Solutions, a renowned global entity specializing in secure data transfer, automation, and orchestration. Through this partnership, organizations associated with HANDD will gain access to Couchdrop for streamlined processes of sending, receiving, and automating secure file transfers using protocols like SFTP. This initiative aims to enhance efficiency and security in file transfer operations.

data.title: AWS and Cerebras Collaboration Aims to Set a New Standard for AI Inference Speed and Performance in the Cloud
data.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) and Cerebras Systems have revealed a partnership to introduce cutting-edge AI inference solutions tailored for generative AI apps and Large Language Models (LLM) workloads. This collaboration will bring forth the quickest AI solutions set to be released in the upcoming months. The setup will make use of Amazon Bedrock within AWS data centers, incorporating AWS Trainium-enabled servers, Cerebras CS-3 systems, and Elastic Fabric Adapter (EFA) networking. Later this year, users can expect this innovative solution to revolutionize AI applications.

data.title: Procurement Sciences Partners with Knox Systems to Secure FedRAMP Authorization on AI Powered Government Contracting Growth Platform
data.description: In a recent update on March 13, 2026, Procurement Sciences, a comprehensive AI growth platform for government contractors, revealed they successfully obtained Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program (FedRAMP) authorization. This milestone was reached through a collaboration with Knox Systems (Knox). FedRAMP accreditation signifies meeting stringent security standards mandated for cloud services used by the U.S. federal government. This achievement underlines the commitment of Procurement Sciences and Knox to enhance their services for government contracts.

data.title: Picsart Unveils AI Copilot in Flow: Turning Every Creator into Their Own Creative Director
data.description: In Miami, Picsart has launched a new AI Copilot in its Picsart Flow system, aiming to reduce the technical burden on creators. With over 130 million monthly users, Picsart is an AI-powered creative platform that strives to empower users. The AI Copilot allows creators to focus on their creative direction rather than technical aspects, making high-end digital filmmaking and storytelling more accessible. This innovation addresses the "Prompting Tax," streamlining processes that often hinder creativity. The goal is to democratize the filmmaking process and make it more seamless for users.

data.title: Keysight Introduces New 224G Test Solutions to Enable 1.6T Optical Network Validation
data.description: In Santa Rosa, California, a company is offering comprehensive electrical and optical validation solutions for various industries. These solutions cover the entire process from research and development to large-scale production.
